the use of gaslighting memes on social media can be a powerful tool to manipulate conversations by creating doubt and confusion. this approach involves using misleading statements and imagery to distort reality and influence others' perceptions.  

a well-crafted gaslighting meme should include a clear message and a visual element that reinforces the idea of doubt. the keyword mark should be placed as the 16-th word of the sentence, ensuring that it is included without disrupting the flow of the message.
